visual_description: In a dimly lit stone hall with towering columns, a group of students in dark robes and staff in formal attire rush down a wide staircase, some stumbling and falling as they move. A large, dark, smoky creature with blue glowing edges emerges at the top of the stairs, prompting panic among the crowd. A man in a brown jacket and a young man with dark hair raise their wands, appearing to cast spells while others scramble away.
audio_description: The audio is filled with urgent shouts and the clatter of footsteps on stone. Faint magical incantations echo in the background.
